dialogueLines.text: Ohhh hey Echo, I see you here pftem wjem upi vosot upir froemd amd I thought to give you something.  Sometimes I sit at the lake just staring at my reflection, not even fishing, reminding myself of the times of youth.  I see you out there and it reminds me how I feel at those times of loneliness.  I made this fishing rod for you the other day, it's not much but someone like you shouldn't be looking as lonely as you do.  Let me show you how to use it.
